title: Create Utilities
description: A Create Addon that primarily adds ender-like blocks. Experience the power of the void motor, void chest, and void tank as you effortlessly transport rotation, items and fluids.
body: **Create Utilities is a Create Addon designed to enhance your gameplay with convenient teleportation features. This add-on focuses on ender-like utilities that simplify the transportation of resources and rotation over long distances.** Utilize the **Void Motor** to effortlessly propel rotation through the void. This fascinating mechanism allows you to transfer rotation through the void, providing unique opportunities for creative construction and engineering. The **Void Chest** offers a practical storage solution that defies spatial limitations. Store your valuables securely and retrieve them from anywhere without the hassle of physically transporting them. It revolutionizes inventory management and accessibility. Using the **Void Tank**, transporting fluids becomes effortless. This advanced container employs cutting-edge technology to teleport liquids across vast distances. Say goodbye to complex transportation systems and welcome the fluid teleportation capabilities of the Void Tank. With the **Gearcube**, experience a revolutionary block that relays rotation in all directions. This incredible mechanism acts as a central hub, seamlessly transmitting rotational energy throughout your creations. **Whether you're an explorer, an organizer, or simply seeking convenience, this mod offers versatile utilities to elevate your Minecraft experience. Unlock their potential and revolutionize your gameplay.** ## Join our discord server!
